fullName: test/specs/authentication/UA_001.e2e.js#Sprint X: Asenso Mobile Version 3 - User Authentication .UA_001: should not allow the user to login when incorrect number is entered.
description:
The system should not allow the user to login. An error message such as **"[Notice] Your number has not been registered yet."** should be displayed.

### Preconditions
1. The login page is accessible.
2. The user attempting to log in is not registered in the system.
